vocab.meaning: ác mộng về khâu vận chuyển/hậu cần
vocab.example: Returning an ill-fitting pair of boots to an international seller can often turn into a logistical nightmare.
I managed to secure a bargain during the Black Friday sales, getting premium leather loafers at a fraction of their retail price.

vocab.word: err on the side of caution
vocab.meaning: chọn giải pháp an toàn/cẩn trọng hơn là mạo hiểm
vocab.example: When I'm between sizes, I usually err on the side of caution and order the larger pair to ensure they aren't too tight.

vocab.meaning: mô hình bán hàng kết hợp cả cửa hàng vật lý và trực tuyến
vocab.example: I prefer bricks-and-clicks retailers because I can try the shoes in-store and then order them online when a discount code becomes available.

vocab.meaning: tầm quan trọng tối thượng/hàng đầu
vocab.example: For long-distance runners, the technical specifications of the midsole are of paramount importance when browsing online catalogs.

vocab.meaning: sự hao mòn tự nhiên qua quá trình sử dụng
vocab.example: It is hard to judge how a pair of sneakers will handle daily wear and tear just by looking at polished promotional photos.

vocab.meaning: việc mua sắm bốc đồng/không dự tính trước
vocab.example: The targeted ads on social media often tempt me into an impulse buy of shoes I don't strictly need.

vocab.meaning: bản hướng dẫn chọn kích cỡ chi tiết/toàn diện
vocab.example: A comprehensive sizing guide that includes foot measurements in centimeters is essential for reducing the rate of returns.
Free shipping and no-hassle returns are key strategies for customer retention in the competitive online footwear market.

vocab.meaning: sự chế tác thủ công chính hiệu/tinh xảo
vocab.example: I am always looking for niche websites that promote authentic craftsmanship rather than mass-produced, low-quality footwear.
